creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #22)
> Does new WoW64 actually work on Linux? It's still labeled as
> experimental, after all.

My understanding is that leading up to Wine 9.0 the new approach
is the default; but let's see how that works out.

That said: Does the old WoW64 actually work on FreeBSD?

Success (or failure) reports welcome - Alex, Sean, and Alistair,
and of course others as well!
